channel.title: Tasmania on The Wisniowski Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Tasmania on The Wisniowski Blog

item.title: Australia Entry #27 - April 26th, 2026 - June 21st, 2026
item.description: Images and Videos Images Here May and June: Learning to Stop Forcing Things Looking back and reflecting on May stirs up a lot of bad emotions within myself.

item.title: Australia Entry #24 - January 11th, 2026 - February 21st, 2026
item.description: Images and Videos Images Here A Calm Birthday Month Typically, with the last few New Years, I’ve tried to use the month of January as one of reflection and as an opportunity to look into the future and try to plan out what I want to focus my time and energy into.

item.title: Australia Entry #17 - March 23rd - April 26th, 2025
item.description: Images and Videos Images Here Before Tasmania This month was a month of firsts for sure.
